complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Project Setup & Tooling into 5 subtasks covering project scaffolding, dependency installation, Tailwind configuration, linting and hooks setup, and CI/CD workflow creation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: The task involves multiple tool installations and configurations across project setup, linting, styling, and CI, increasing complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Core Layout & Styling into 5 subtasks covering custom theme configuration, BaseLayout.vue creation, static SEO tag setup in index.html, dynamic meta tag integration, and global CSS/typography setup.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Requires theme customization, layout component coding, and SEO integration, but follows standard patterns.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Basic Navigation Framework into 4 subtasks covering NavBar.vue component creation, smooth scrolling implementation, MobileMenu.vue with Pinia state, and navigation styling with Tailwind.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Straightforward implementation of navigation components and scroll behavior, minimal complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Static Content Sections into 5 subtasks covering creation of HeroSection.vue, AboutSection.vue, ServiceGrid.vue with ServiceCard.vue, ContactForm.vue, and integration of these sections into the main view.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Simple creation of static components and layout integration with placeholder content.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Responsive Design & Accessibility into 5 subtasks covering mobile-first responsive utilities, ARIA attributes and roles, dark/high-contrast mode toggle, reduced-motion respect, and color contrast/font size validation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to accessibility compliance, keyboard support, and responsive design requirements.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Advanced Navigation Interactivity into 4 subtasks covering IntersectionObserver composable implementation, SectionIndicator.vue creation, scroll progress bar development, and MobileMenu slide animations.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Involves advanced browser APIs, state management, and animation coordination, which is moderately complex.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Hero Section Animations into 4 subtasks covering parallax background composable integration, typewriter/fade-in text animations, CTAButton hover/focus transitions, and reduced-motion compliance.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Requires custom animations, composable integration, and accessibility considerations, adding moderate complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Service Section Interactivity into 4 subtasks covering hover effects on ServiceCard, ServiceModal.vue with animations, SVG icon micro-interactions, and dynamic import for modal lazy-loading.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Combines UI effects, modal state management, animations, and performance optimizations, making it moderately complex.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Performance Optimization into 5 subtasks covering image lazy-loading, dynamic imports for code splitting, critical CSS inlining with Vite plugin, Lighthouse CI performance budgets setup, and image WebP optimization.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Entails several performance strategies and tooling configurations with strict metrics targets, increasing complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Please break down Backend Contact Form Integration into 5 subtasks covering Fastify server setup, Prisma schema and migration, POST /api/contact endpoint with zod validation, SendGrid email integration, and JSON response handling.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Backend development with database migrations, schema validation, and email integration involves multiple layers, making it complex.
